title: Dog Tail Wag (Optifine/CEM)
description: Your dog's tail wags the closer you are. Also, more curious head tilts.
body:
![GIF of Dog wagging it's tail the closer you are, and tilting it's head when it looks at you](https://media2.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExOGIwc2MxZWQzdWVjMWNtbGNpNjV3NDZ2OWY3bWxwZ2JnbmI1ODFodCZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/Efup1DMNYY4pz5qXd0/giphy.gif)
### What else could you possibly need than a friend that is happy to see you?
### 

[Optifine](https://optifine.net/home) (or a cem loader mod) is required
